Title: Failure to obtain approval from IA on material outsourcing
Metric: Number of instances where company did not obtain approval from IA prior to onboarding vendor for material outsourcing
BaseData: 1. List of new vendors during the quarter 2. IA approvals taken for those vendors

Title: Absence of proof of approval obtained by Tawuniya from IA prior to launch of new product or changes in existing product
Metric: Number of instances where company has failed to obtain the approval received by Tawuniya from IA prior to launch of new product
BaseData: 1. List of new products launched during the quarter 2. IA approvals taken for those products

Title: Communication of new regulation to business departments
Metric: Number of instances where the new regulation was not circulated to the relevant business departments
BaseData: 1. List of new circulars/regulation/ rules issued by IA during the quarter 2. E-mail communication of the circular to the relevant business department

Title: Regulatory reporting
Metric: Number of instances with delay or non submission of Regulatory Reporting
BaseData: Number of instances where there was delay or non-submission in regulatory reporting

Title: Regulatory breaches
Metric: Number of instances of regulatory breaches
BaseData: Report on regulatory breaches conducted by the compliance department

Title: Regulatory fines and penalty
Metric: Number of instances where regulator imposed fines and penalty
BaseData: E-mail communication received by the regulator on fines and penalties

Title: Failure to perform Customer Due Diligence
Metric: Number of instances of non performance of customer due diligence for all new customers onboarded during the quarter
BaseData: 1. List of new customers onboarded during the quarter 2. Evidence of Customer Due Diligence performed during the quarter

Title: Non submission of Suspicious Transaction Reporting
Metric: Number of instances of not filling STR for confirmed suspicious transactions
BaseData: STR tracker

Title: Average Claim Settlement Time
Metric: (Settlement time - date of completion of documentation)/ Total claims settled
BaseData: 1.Sum of Settlement Times for All Claims 2. Total number of claims

Title: Claims recovery ratio
Metric: Claim amount recovered in current quarter from new claims recovery added in current quarter
BaseData: Sum total of claim amount recovered in Q1 (SAR 773,595.52 ) from new claims recovery (SAR 1,880,009.69 ) outstanding Recovery in Q1 (Total = 2,653,605.21)

Title: Claims settled outside policy period
Metric: Number of claims that were settled outside the policy period
BaseData: Number of claims that were settled outside the policy period

Title: Individual Claim settlement (Excluding Fraud claims)
Metric: Delay in claim settlement beyond regulatory timelines of 5 days (For amount less than 2000 SAR)
BaseData: Number of claims settled beyond 5 days

Title: Individual Claim settlement (Excluding Fraud claims)
Metric: Delay in claim settlement beyond regulatory timelines of 15 days (For amount more than 2000 SAR)
BaseData: Number of claims settled beyond 15 days

Title: Corporate Claim settlement (Excluding Fraud claims)
Metric: Delay in claim settlement beyond regulatory timelines of 45 days
BaseData: Number of claims settled beyond 45 days

Title: Claims payout against cases tagged as fraudulent claims
Metric: Number of claims that were settled which were proven fraud
BaseData: Count of claims settled which were tagged as fraudulent claims in system

Title: Increase in number of confirmed fraudulent claims
Metric: Variance in percentage of proven fraudulent claims vs current quarter
BaseData: 1. Number of proven fraudulent claims (225) 2. Number of claims reported (8971)

Title: Identifying fraudulent claims
Metric: Results of potential fraud claims reported to authorities (Najm, Tagdeer, Ministry) for investigation
BaseData: 1. Number of confirmed fraudulent claims by authorities 2. Number of potential fraudulent claims reported for investigation

Title: Duplicate claims settled
Metric: Number of incorrect/duplicate payout
BaseData: Number of incorrect/duplicate payout

Title: Claims settled without required documentation
Metric: Number of claims that were settled without minimum documents required for settlement (except najm and bashir cases)
BaseData: Number of claims that were settled without minimum documents required for settlement

Title: Claim settlement ratio
Metric: Outstanding - Paid cases / Paid cases
BaseData: 1. Number of paid claims - 8395 from the claims registered in Q1 2. Number of outstanding claims - 207 from the claims registered in Q1

Title: Low First Call Resolution
Metric: (Number of First Call Resolutions / Total Number of Inbound Calls attended) * 100
BaseData: 1. Number of First Call Resolutions 2. Total Number of Inbound Calls attended

Title: High Abandon calls
Metric: (Number of Abandon calls / Total Number of Inbound Calls) * 100
BaseData: 1. Number of Abandon calls 2. Total Number of Inbound Calls

Title: Delay in compliant closure
Metric: (Count of delayed closure complaints / Count of total closed complaints) * 100
BaseData: 1. Count of delayed closure complaints 2. Count of total closed complaints

Title: Delay in compliant closure - Insurance Authority
Metric: Count of delayed closure complaints of Insurance Authority complaints
BaseData: Count of delayed closure complaints of Insurance Authority complaints

Title: Compliant closure
Metric: Monthly count of Delay in standard compliant closure beyond regulatory timeline of 5 days
BaseData: Monthly count of Delay in standard compliant closure beyond regulatory timeline of 5 days

Title: Unsatisfactory CSAT score
Metric: Achieve CSAT score of 89% or more
BaseData: Scores based on customer feedback surveys

Title: NPS Composite
Metric: Achieve NPS score of 62 or more
BaseData: Scores based on customer feedback surveys Likelihood to recommend

Title: CES Score
Metric: Achieve CES score of 3.5% or less
BaseData: Scores based on customer feedback surveys Customer effort score (CES)

Title: Cyber security incidents
Metric: Count of Critical or delayed unresolved Cyber Security Incidents during the quarter
BaseData: Number of instances of critical cyber security incidents or critical incidents not closed within defined turnaround time occurred during the quarter

Title: Data leak incidents
Metric: Count of critical data leak incidents during the quarter
BaseData: Number of instances of critical data leak incidents as per data classification policy during the quarter

Title: Critical systems or customer facing systems were unavailable for carrying out BAU activities due to Cyber Security issues like virus/ ransomware/ hacking/phishing attacks
Metric: Count of instances where critical systems or customer facing systems were unavailable due to cyber incidents
BaseData: Number of instances where critical systems or customer facing systems were unavailable during the quarter due to cyber security incidents
DataSource: Monthly SOC REPORT / Querterly it REPORT ON INCIDENT

Title: Vulnerability Scanning
Metric: Count of Vulnerability scans performed
BaseData: Number of Vulnerability scans performed meets the requirements defined in the Vulnerability testing Policy

Title: Open/outstanding identified High risk vulnerabilities with the aging of more than 1 month
Metric: Number of unresolved high rated findings with aging more than 1 month / Total high rated findings * 100
BaseData: 1) Number of unresolved high rated findings with aging more than 1 month 2) Total high rated findings (link with internal classification)

Title: Conducting PEN testing
Metric: Count of PEN testing conducted
BaseData: Number of PEN testing conducted during the year

Title: DDOS Protection sloution
Metric: The time it takes for the DDoS protection system to start blocking malicious traffic after detecting an attack.
BaseData: The exact time when the DDoS protection system started blocking or filtering the malicious traffic.

Title: Critical systems unavailable due to Cyber attack
Metric: Zero tolerance for systems unavailability due to Cyber attack

Title: Zero tolerance on appointing Partners without approval
Metric: Count of partners appointed without approval
BaseData: Number of partners appointed without approval

Title: Due diligence not performed on partners before starting the partnership
Metric: Count of partners appointed wherein due diligence is not performed
BaseData: Number of partners appointed wherein due diligence is not performed

Title: Delays in Project completion of products
Metric: (Number of project delayed beyond agreed timeline/Number of project)*100
BaseData: Project status tracker

Title: Approvals were not obtained for UI and UX changes or implementation
Metric: No of instances where approvals were not obtained
BaseData: New or change implementation tracker

Title: Absence of sign offs on the product testings
Metric: No of instances where sign offs where not obtained after performing product testing
BaseData: Product testing report

Title: Non compliance with regulatory requirements with respect to Product
Metric: No. of instances of non compliance with regulatory requirements
BaseData: Compliance review report

Title: Fraudulent attempts to initiate unauthorized payments
Metric: Count of fraudulent payments attempted
BaseData: Number of identified fraudulent payments attempted
RedThreshold: Number of identified fraudulent payments attempted

Title: Decrease in revenue from targeted revenue
Metric: (Targeted revenue for the quarter - Revenue for the quarter) / Targeted revenue for the quarter *100
BaseData: 1) Revenue for the quarter - [56,266,111] 2) Targeted revenue for the quarter - [39,839,250]
RedThreshold: 1) Revenue for the quarter - [56,266,111] 2) Targeted revenue for the quarter - [39,839,250]

Title: Increase in General and Administration expenses in excess of approved budget
Metric: (Incurred General and Administration expense for the quarter - Budgeted General and Administration expense) / General and Administration expense *100
BaseData: 1) Incurred General and Administration expense for the quarter - [13,107,963] 2) Budgeted General and Administration expense - [17,607,786]
RedThreshold: 1) Incurred General and Administration expense for the quarter - [13,107,963] 2) Budgeted General and Administration expense - [17,607,786]

Title: Inadequate Liquidity Management (Negative balance / balance below limit prescribed in bank account) i.e. SAR 500,000
Metric: Count of instances when there has been negative balance / balance below limit prescribed in bank account
BaseData: Number of instances when there has been negative balance / balance below limit prescribed in bank account -
RedThreshold: Number of instances when there has been negative balance / balance below limit prescribed in bank account -

Title: Long pending open items in Bank Reconciliation
Metric: Count of entries pending for reconciliation for more than 2 months
BaseData: Number of entries pending for reconciliation for more than 2 months -
RedThreshold: Number of entries pending for reconciliation for more than 2 months -

Title: Deviation from annual Procurement Plan
Metric: Actual amount spent during the quarter / Budgeted amount allocated for the quarter
BaseData: 1) Actual amount spent during the quarter - [ SAR 5,141,502 ] 2) Budgeted amount allocated for the quarter - [ SAR 6,370,903 ] * 100
RedThreshold: 1) Actual amount spent during the quarter - [ SAR 5,141,502 ] 2) Budgeted amount allocated for the quarter - [ SAR 6,370,903 ] * 100

Title: General and Administration (G&A) expenses
Metric: Managing General and Administration (G&A) expenses in overall budgeted amount

Title: Profit and Loss
Metric: Achieve 90% or more of the targeted Profit after Tax (PAT)

Title: Inadequate Liquidity Management
Metric: Count of working days when the limit of the balance available on payments account is equal or less than 10% of latest fund received by parent company.

Title: Capex
Metric: Managing Capex Versus budgeted amount

Title: Fraudulent Procurement Activities
Metric: Track the number of reported or detected instances of fraudulent activities involving procurement personnel or suppliers.
BaseData: Number of reported or detected instances of fraudulent activities involving procurement personnel or suppliers

Title: Purchase Requisition Cycle Time
Metric: Purchase Requisition Cycle Time = Requisition Approval Date - Requisition Submission Date
BaseData: 1) Requisition Approval Date - Data not available 2) Requisition Submission Date - Data not available

Title: Empanelment of Vendor without approval
Metric: Count of vendor empaneled during the quarter without approval
BaseData: Number of vendor empaneled during the quarter without approval

Title: High employee turnover
Metric: Employee turnover rate shall not be more than 25% for the period [Number of employees that have left the organization / Total number of employees] * 100 Average Number of Employees = Total Employees at Start of the period + Total Employees at the end of the period / 2
BaseData: Total percentage of employee turnover

Title: Percentage of breach of code of conduct
Metric: Number of instances resulting in violation of code of conduct
BaseData: Number of instances where a breach of the code of conduct was violated

Title: Completion of regulatory training by employees
Metric: No. of employees who have not completed the mandatory (AML and Anti fraud) trainings within 3 months from joining date
BaseData: Number of instances reported where employees have not completed the mandatory (AML and Anti fraud) trainings within 3 months from joining date

Title: Completion of regulatory training by employees
Metric: No. of employees who have not completed the test of the mandatory (IFCE) trainings within 3 months from joining date
BaseData: Number of instances reported where employees have attended the mandatory (IFCE) trainings within 3 months from joining date

Title: Completion of regulatory training by employees
Metric: No. of employees who have not passed the test of the mandatory (IFCE) trainings within 9 months from joining date
BaseData: Number of instances reported where employees have passed the test of mandatory (IFCE) trainings within 9 months from joining date

Title: Non-compliance with Saudization requirements
Metric: Saudization %
BaseData: Number of instances reported for non-compliance to Saudization

Title: Background checks on new hires
Metric: Number of instances of non performing background checks for new hires
BaseData: Number of instances of non performing background checks for new hires

Title: Instances of incorrect/duplicate/fraud payroll transactions
Metric: Number of duplicate payroll transactions or salary paid to dummy employees or fraudulent transactions
BaseData: Number of duplicate payroll transactions or salary paid to dummy employees or fraudulent transactions

Metric: Percentage by which the actual expenditure on manpower exceeds the budgeted amount
BaseData: Percentage by which the actual expenditure on manpower exceeds the budgeted amount. 1. Budgeted manpower cost for Q1 2026 SAR [13,820,449] 2. Actual manpower cost for Q1-2026: SAR [12,968,273]

Metric: Number of cases where full and final settlement exceeded the 15 days timeline from the last working day of the employee

Title: Non compliance in maintaining essential government licences

BaseData: Number of instances where the HR Manager did not comply in maintaining the relevant government licences

Metric: Achieve 81% or more of the targeted Employee Engagement Score
BaseData: Total percentage of Employee Engagement Score

BaseData: Number of Key position (eg, C-suite) vacant for more than 90 Days

Title: Delay in patch deployment
Metric: Number of instances of delay in patch deployment beyond agreed timeline

Metric: Number of devices where antivirus software is not installed / or latest software is not installed

Metric: Number of changes without approval
